title: caletia orientalis var. orbicularis
intro: Caletia orientalis var. orbicularis, also known as Calotropis procera, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. It is a member of the Apocynaceae family and is recognized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, snake bites, and skin conditions, due to its rich content of alkaloids and glycosides. The herbal preparations of Caletia orientalis var. orbicularis include infusion, decoction, and poultice, which can be used to extract its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
